_meta.purpose: APPROXIMATE locator bounding boxes + centroids for each living-landscape CODE, with a country-level fallback per country. Frontend plots centroids; STAC export seeds extent.spatial.bbox.
_meta.bbox_order: [west, south, east, north]  (minLon, minLat, maxLon, maxLat)
_meta.accuracy: APPROXIMATE / coarse locator boxes only. NOT survey-grade and NOT authoritative delineations. Real delineated boundaries are a 2026 MOSAIC objective and will replace these. Safe for map locating and STAC discovery extents; do NOT use for analysis or clipping.
_meta.lookup_rule: Engineer: look up by landscape CODE first. If code missing or = GLB-UNSPEC, fall back to country_fallback by Country. If country also unknown, use GLB-UNSPEC (world-ish box) and flag.
_meta.status: PROVISIONAL - refine when canonical landscape geometries exist.

COL-NAT.name: Colombia (national fallback - replace when COL landscape confirmed)

PER-NAT.name: Peru (national fallback - replace when PER landscape confirmed)

GLB-UNSPEC.name: Unspecified - coarse programme-wide box; flag for repair
